title: tigridia multiflora
intro: Tigridia multiflora, also known as Mexican Shellflower or Tiger Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Tigridia multiflora include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
